title: Blood Moon Horizon
description: a custom red moon sky for Minecraft
body:
# blood moon horizon
"Blood Moon Horizon: A Custom Red Sky Resource Pack for Minecraft" is a meticulously crafted modification that transforms the game's sky into a mesmerizing crimson spectacle. As day transitions into night, players are immersed in an eerie ambiance, reminiscent of a blood moon phenomenon. The pack meticulously adjusts sky textures and colors, creating a hauntingly beautiful atmosphere that adds depth and immersion to the Minecraft experience. Whether exploring the depths of underground caverns or building towering structures, players will be captivated by the ominous allure of the red sky above.
